emails.subject: Futures Documentation
emails.body: Sara, The clearing agreement is below. We do not need to complete the Give-up agreement. We will execute and clear through CSFB for this activity. Sheila Forwarded by Sheila Glover/HOU/ECT on 07/27/2000 03:21 PM "Reis, Steven" <steven.reis@csfb.com> on 07/27/2000 02:58:04 PM

emails.subject: futures documentation
emails.body: futures documentation Sheila: Here's the status (1) Goldman Sachs I received comments on May 22, 2001. Ball is in my court. (2) MSDW I faxed comments to Joseph A. Marovich on May 2, 2001. Fax No. was 212/762-9502. No response. (3) Salomon Smith Barney I faxed comments to Tania Meyer Wilson on May 2, 2001. Fax No. was 312/648-3328. No response. Please let me know about (2) and (3). Thanks. Sara Shackleton Enron North America Corp. 1400 Smith Street, EB 3801a Houston, Texas 77002 713-853-5620 (phone) 713-646-3490 (fax) sara.shackleton@enron.com

emails.subject: futures documentation
emails.body: Sara, I sent Brian Gallagher a fax tonight, 312-648-3570, requesting follow-up by him because we have not heard from Tania. SG Forwarded by Sheila Glover/HOU/ECT on 05/30/2001 07:36 PM From: Sara Shackleton on 05/30/2001 05:18 PM
